name: The Bank of Okinawa, Ltd.
summary: The Bank of Okinawa, Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, provides various banking and financial services in Japan and internationally. The company offers leasing, credit card, credit guaranty, security, and other services. It also engages in the cash counting and clerical operations; financial and economic conditions surveys, and general research; and credit management and collection operations, as well as the provision of computer-related services. As of March 31, 2020, it operated 65 branches. The company was founded in 1956 and is headquartered in Naha, Japan.
